blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.8" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 41".
